meaning: 与地球的相对位置不变的
examples: What we need is a really tall tower here on the ground right at the equator and a satellite in geostationary orbit.
Once you are in this geostationary orbit right over the tower, just lower your carbon nanotube cable down from the satellite, tether it to the tower here on Earth.
Artwork showing space debris in low and geostationary Earth orbit.
The first geostationary communications satellite went up in 1960, changing global capital markets instantly.
Big geostationary satellites, orbiting 26, 000 miles above the sky, are a lousy two-way synchronous Internet medium.
